name: The Midnight Heirloom
description: A deep-set Ceylon Blue Sapphire surrounded by a halo of micro-pave diamonds. Hand-forged in 18k White Gold.

name: Island Aura Solitaire
description: Inspired by the Sri Lankan coastline. A minimalist pendant featuring a rare 2ct Pear-cut Aquamarine.

name: Royal Ceylon Band
description: Traditional 22k Yellow Gold band featuring intricate hand-carved filigree work by our master craftsmen.

name: The Azure Marquise
description: An elongated Marquise-cut Sapphire that creates a striking silhouette, set in a modern minimalist shank.

name: Lanka Glow Studs
description: Dainty 18k Rose Gold studs featuring brilliant-cut Padparadscha spinels for a soft, sunrise-inspired hue.

name: Sovereign Ruby Drop
description: A museum-quality unheated Ceylon Ruby drop pendant. A true collector's piece with GRS certification.

name: Midnight Galaxy Bracelet
description: A tennis-style bracelet alternating between deep blue sapphires and VS1 clarity diamonds.

name: Coastal Pearl Enclave
description: Hand-picked South Sea pearl set within a textured gold 'shell' inspired by the Negombo shorelines.

name: Heritage Gold Choker
description: A heavy 22k gold statement piece, recreating 19th-century Ceylonese royal patterns for the modern woman.
